title: 2-file commit: checkNull normalises undefined + toastReducer default toastType
commit_message: fix: treat undefined like null in checkNull; default toast severity to warning

why_mixed.explanation: Two unrelated files. utilities.js affects standalone utilities.pure.test.js (CRITICAL/HIGH for checkNull and siblings). toastReducer.js affects feature/favourites-watchlist.feature.test.js (CRITICAL for toastReducer describe, HIGH for favouritesReducer in the same file). Together this hits standalone + feature — the same cross-category signature as scenario 3, but with a smaller cross-dependent footprint than scenario 3 (capitalizeFirstLetter).

CRITICAL.reason: describe label matches changed symbol; sources include changed file

tests.test: checkNull > returns an empty string when the value is null
tests.result: ⚠️  MAY FAIL — if undefined must now return '' and test only covered null

tests.test: checkNull > returns the original value when it is defined and non-null
toastReducer > initialises with showToast as null
tests.result: ⚠️  MAY FAIL — default toastType may no longer be 'info'

tests.test: toastReducer > TOAST action stores the toast message in showToast
toastReducer > resets showToast to null when null is dispatched
toastReducer > returns unchanged state for an unknown action

HIGH.reason: Sibling utilities symbols; sibling favourites describe in the same feature file

tests.test: checkArray > returns an empty array when the input is null
checkArray > returns the original array when it contains items
checkWhiteSpace > returns true for a string that contains a space
checkWhiteSpace > returns false for a string with no whitespace
getTimes > returns 0 hours when the duration is under 3600 seconds
getProgressWidth > calculates 50% when value is half of max
getProgressWidth > returns 0 when the value argument is missing or falsy
favouritesReducer > starts with an empty userFavourites list
favouritesReducer > UPDATEALLFAVOURITIESDETAILS replaces the favourites list
favouritesReducer > sets favouritesFetched to true once the list is loaded
favouritesReducer > returns unchanged state for an unknown action

SKIP.reason: No overlap with unchanged categories for this diff

coverage_gaps.detail: Add explicit expectation that checkNull(undefined) returns '' if product requires it.
Initial state test may need expect(state.toastType).toBe('warning') if default changed.
